mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE role_list AS ( SELECT r.role_id, r.role_security, r.role_nm, r.upper_role_id, 1 AS depth, CAST(r.role_security AS CHAR(500)) AS path FROM role_info r WHERE r.upper_role_id = 0 AND r.status_flag = 'y'
UNION ALL
SELECT r.role_id, r.role_security, r.role_nm, r.upper_role_id, rl.depth + 1, CONCAT(rl.path, ' > ', r.role_security) FROM role_info r INNER JOIN role_list rl ON r.upper_role_id = rl.role_id WHERE r.status_flag = 'y' ) SELECT path FROM role_list pl WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM role_list cl WHERE cl.upper_role_id = pl.role_id ) ORDER BY depth DESC
